$description: Binance — bold Binance-Yellow accent on a deep monochrome canvas, trading-floor urgency, IBM Plex Sans body, tabular numerics. Derived from getdesign.md/binance/design-md. MIT.

accent.$description: Binance Yellow — primary brand mark + CTA fill.

highlight.$description: Companion warm yellow — small inline highlights, badges, focus rings.

black.$description: Body ink — on Binance's dark canvas the default text reads as soft cool white. Semantic-name kept; value flipped (Spotify pattern) to invert the palette without rewriting layouts.

ink.$description: Pure crypto-black — chapter dividers, deepest contrast band beneath the canvas.

graphite.$description: Body strong on dark — emphasized paragraphs, lead text.

steel.$description: Muted on dark — sub-headings, breadcrumbs, secondary labels.

silver.$description: Muted soft on dark — captions, fine-print, tab inactive.

fog.$description: Hairline border on dark surfaces — separator strokes.

paper.$description: Elevated card surface — feature cards, content cards above the canvas (order book / ticker tile).

paper-2.$description: Strongest elevated surface — emphasized cards, hover state.

off-white.$description: On-dark text — soft cool white that echoes the body ink.

off-white-2.$description: On-dark soft — footer body text, secondary labels.

surface-dark.$description: Trading-pane / cover surface — Binance deep black.

surface-dark-elevated.$description: Elevated cards inside dark bands — order book, ticker tile.

surface-dark-soft.$description: Code block / terminal backgrounds inside dark cards.

surface-soft.$description: Section dividers, soft band backgrounds — never light, Binance is dark-first.

surface-cream-strong.$description: Strongest surface — selected tabs, emphasized bands.

accent-teal.$description: Secondary product accent — trade-up green doubles as positive status dot.

warning.$description: Status warning — Binance Yellow doubles as caution.

white.$description: Canvas — Binance deep crypto-black, the brand-defining dark backdrop. Semantic-name kept; value flipped to invert the palette without rewriting layouts.

font-family.$description: Geometric sans pairing — Binance Plex Sans (custom IBM Plex variant) display + IBM Plex Sans body. IBM Plex Mono for tabular numerics on the trading floor.

font-weight.$description: Display sizes prefer weight 500/600 (medium/semibold) per Binance's geometric sans aesthetic — bold reads as ticker-screen, regular reads as body.

radius.$description: Binance uses 4px on chips/pills, 8px on CTAs/buttons, 12px on content cards. Tighter than Claude — exchange UI prefers crisp rectangles.
